outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump gives Iran 48 hours as search for downed airman continues behind enemy lines
outlets.summary: CNN leads with Trump ultimatum and missing WSO behind Iranian lines. Focus on humanitarian and military risk.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: U.S. searches for downed airman as Iran keeps striking Gulf states
outlets.summary: WaPo focuses on missing pilot, questions air dominance claims after F-15E and A-10 losses.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran has 48 hours — Graham: 'overwhelming force' coming
outlets.summary: Fox frames Trump ultimatum as decisive leadership. Graham endorsement of overwhelming force prominently featured.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Rubio strips Soleimani niece of green card — ICE arrests
outlets.summary: NY Post leads with Rubio's action against Soleimani family as domestic enforcement angle.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Projectile hits Iran's Bushehr nuclear plant — IAEA says 1 killed, no radiation leak
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera leads with Bushehr nuclear plant attack and IAEA response. Extensive coverage of Tyre hospital damage and Lebanon casualties.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Iran rejects US ceasefire proposal as Trump deadline looms
outlets.summary: Reuters covers diplomatic collapse — ceasefire rejected, mediation at dead end, April 6 deadline approaching.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Iranian missile fragments found near Kirya — cluster munitions hit residential areas
outlets.summary: JPost leads with missile fragments near IDF HQ. Detailed reporting on cluster munitions damage in Tel Aviv suburbs.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Four wounded as Iranian missiles explode over central Israel — building collapse in Ramat Gan
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers impact on civilian life — building damage, power outages, injuries from cluster munitions.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: US-Israeli barbaric strikes hit Mahshahr petrochemical zone — Araghchi warns of Bushehr catastrophe
outlets.summary: Iranian media condemns strikes on civilian infrastructure. Amplifies Araghchi's Bushehr warnings and Zaporizhzhia double-standard argument.

outlets.name: PressTV
outlets.headline: IRGC missile salvos pound occupied territories — cluster munitions shake Tel Aviv
outlets.summary: PressTV frames Iranian strikes as retaliatory success. Claims cluster munitions near IDF HQ as proof of penetrating Iron Dome.
